capsule.meta.title: Seal — a private note, kept forever
capsule.meta.description: Write a note only you can read, sealed on-chain forever. No owner, no admin — no one else can open it or take it down. Your key, your words, yours alone.
capsule.onboard.compat: Your key comes from your passkey. Keep Apple devices on iOS 26.5 / macOS 26.5.1 or later — older versions can derive a different key on iPhone vs Mac and fail to open a note.
capsule.tagline: Seal it once. Yours alone, forever.
capsule.permanence: Sealed for good — it can never be edited, deleted, or read by anyone but you.
capsule.firstHere: You're the first here. Your first note also activates Seal on this chain — a one-time setup.
capsule.write.placeholder: Write it here. Only you will ever read it again.
capsule.archive.title: Past notes
capsule.archive.empty:
Nothing sealed on this chain yet.
Your first note is waiting.
capsule.status.signing: Confirm with your passkey to seal
capsule.error.noWebAuthn: This browser can't create a passkey. Try Safari, Chrome, or Edge.
capsule.error.noPrf: This device can't unlock your key. Update to the latest OS, or try another device.
capsule.error.tooLong: This note is a little too long — trim it and try again.
capsule.error.sealFailed: Couldn't seal your note. Please try again.
capsule.error.lowBalance: Not enough {symbol} to cover the fee. Add a little to {address} and try again.
capsule.error.loadFailed: Couldn't load your notes. Please try again.
capsule.error.loadMoreFailed: Couldn't load more. Please try again.
capsule.error.cooldown: One note per chain every 12 hours. You can write again {when}.
capsule.error.txReverted: That didn't go through. Please try again in a moment.
capsule.error.bundlerGas: The gas relayer is out of funds right now. Add about {amount} {symbol} to {address}, then try again.
capsule.gate.title: Choose a chain
capsule.gate.subtitle: Pick where your notes live. You can switch anytime.
capsule.onboard.identityProse: An identity that's yours alone — a passkey on this device. No password, no seed phrase.
capsule.onboard.nameProse: Public and bound to your passkey. It can't be changed later.
capsule.onboard.keyProse: Your key comes from your passkey — nothing extra to remember, and it never leaves this device. Only it can open your notes.
capsule.onboard.errSyncFailed: Your key was created, but syncing failed. Please try again.
capsule.onboard.errRetryFailed: Retry failed — please try again later.
